title: FullStory Segment
description: A segment in FullStory representing a saved group of users matching specific behavioral criteria. Segments can be used for exports, alerts, and webhook notifications.

creator.description: Email address of the FullStory user who created the segment

created.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp for when the segment was created. Not present for built-in segments.

url.description: URL to view the segment in the FullStory application

segmentId.description: The ID of the segment to export

type.description: The type of data to export: individuals for user data or events for behavioral event data

format.description: The output format for the export

timeRange.description: Optional time range to filter the exported data

segmentTimeRange.description: Optional time range for segment membership evaluation

TimeRange.description: A time range defined by start and end timestamps

start.description: Start of the time range in RFC 3339 format

end.description: End of the time range in RFC 3339 format
